---
title: Cytology
author: JK
date: '2020-06-16'
slug: cytology
categories:
  - Pathology
tags: []
event: ~
event_url: ~
location: ~
summary: ~
abstract: ~
date_end: '2020-06-16T07:12:31+09:00'
all_day: no
publishDate: '2020-06-16T07:12:31+09:00'
authors: []
featured: no
image:
  caption: ''
  focal_point: ''
  preview_only: no
url_slides: "https://www.jkangpathology.com/slide/Cytology.pdf"
url_code: ~
url_pdf: ~
url_video: ~
slides: ''
projects: []
---
